title: Compliance: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c link signatures
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.3-8.5. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c. Status: COMPLIANT (conditional). RX path (authenticate_inner_payload L223-345): When parsed.signature_present, verifies with schnorr48_verify_frame() at L273-278, returns -LICHEN_EAUTH on failure. Also verifies MIC (L311) and commits to replay table (L382-388). Note: Verification requires ctx->peer_pubkey to be set.
